team.Saroj: Developer — builds screens, prototype, and code. Hours tracked here.
team.David Caruana: Builder / Product Owner — directs requirements, reviews work, sends feedback. Records his own hours separately.

tracker_note: This tracker records SAROJ'S developer hours only. David tracks his own hours independently.
workflow: David reviews → sends annotated feedback to Saroj → Saroj implements → repeat

Screen design — Builder web views: Login, Dashboard, Projects, Compliance Records, SWMS (Slides 1-5 of PPTX)

sessions.task: Business Analysis — full file review (19-page annotated PDF, 16-slide PPTX, 34 scenarios), 13-section BA Report (OHS_Builder_Victoria_BA_Report.docx), REVIEW_FOR_PROTOTYPE.md, TIME_TRACKER setup

sessions.task: SWMS library integration — downloaded all 50 SWMS PDFs from David's Google Drive, extracted real WorkSafe VIC hazard/control data from all 49 trades (424 hazard rows), created swmsLibrary.js (3,811 lines), updated SwmsSigning.jsx to show trade-specific PPE + hazards, updated SWMS.jsx builder page with searchable 49-trade library. mockData.js fully restored and upgraded.
sessions.notes: 49 trades × real hazard data. swmsLibrary.js + findSwms() lookup function. Worker portal now shows correct trade SWMS on sign page.

sessions.task: Terminology audit and global rename — Worker → Stakeholder across all user-facing labels in 12 source files (Login, BuilderLayout, WorkerLayout, ComplianceMatrix, Compliance, ProjectDetail, AdminPortal, Dashboard, Projects, SWMS, SiteDiary, Registration, mockData). Code variables preserved. REVIEW_FOR_PROTOTYPE.md updated. Executive launch readiness report produced.
